text:
AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 – 7, or 
Null/Missing 

COMMENT: Variables included in this count are the seven fields that begin with “SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_*”. These 
are: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_HEAT_SW, SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_LEAD_SW, 
SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_MOLD_SW, SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_OVEN_SW, 
SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_PESTS_SW, SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_SMK_DTCTR_SW, and 
SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_WTR_LEAK_SW. 

Variables that start with “SR” include information for each screening.
